title: Japanese-Style Takoyaki with Magical Spice
description: A fusion of Japanese and magical flavors, this dish is a unique twist on the classic takoyaki. The mildly sweet takoyaki balls are filled with a delicious blend of magical spice and savory lemongrass.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine takoyaki mix, magical spice, and minced lemongrass. Gradually add in dashi broth and mix until smooth.
Heat a takoyaki pan or a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Using a ladle, add a small amount of the mix to the pan and cook until the bottom is golden brown.
Flip the takoyaki balls over and cook for another 2-3 minutes.
Serve with Japanese mayo, green onion, sesame seeds, and takoyaki sauce.
Garnish with additional green onion and sesame seeds, if desired.
